transcription.text: The impossible mission? Finish the wash without a stain walking right in. Introducing new 7-Day Stain Stick from Spray and Wash. Now stains are no problem with new 7-Day Stain Stick. Its special formula lets me treat a tough stain today. And watch, now I can put off washing till the end of the week. I love it. New Stain Stick from Spray and Wash. For stains you thought would...

segments.text: The impossible mission? Finish the wash without a stain walking right in.
Introducing new 7-Day Stain Stick from Spray and Wash.

Its special formula lets me treat a tough stain today.
And watch, now I can put off washing till the end of the week.
